# crypto

```go
import "github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/common/crypto"
```

Package crypto wraps the hash primitives used throughout the chain, VM, and wallet layers.

### Overview

crypto exposes three hash functions and nothing else:

- [Hash](<#Hash>) — SHA3\-256 \(variadic; concatenates its arguments before hashing\). This is the canonical hash used by [chain/nom](<https://pkg.go.dev/chain/nom/>) for block hashes, by the embedded contracts for storage keys, and by the VM for changes\-hash computation.
- [HashSHA256](<#HashSHA256>) — SHA\-256, used for ABI\-style preimages where a widely\-implemented standard digest is required.
- [Keccak256](<#Keccak256>) — Legacy Keccak256 \(Ethereum\-compatible\), used by the bridge embedded contract when computing pre\-EIP\-152 EVM hashes.

Ed25519 signing/verification lives in [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/wallet](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/wallet/>); address derivation lives in [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/common/types](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/common/types/>).

### Related Packages

- [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/wallet](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/wallet/>) — Ed25519 keypair generation, signing, and verification.
- [github.com/zenon\\\-network/go\\\-zenon/common/types](<https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/zenon-network/go-zenon/common/types/>) — address and hash value types, plus public\-key\-to\-address derivation.
